brand-story-img.query: Designed for the Modern Heirloom Velmora was born from a simple belief: fine-feeling jewelry should feel attainable. Every piece is designed in-house, plated in 18K gold, and finished by hand. We create demi-fine treasures meant to be worn, loved, and eventually passed down.

results.alt: Designed for the Modern Heirloom Velmora was born from a simple belief: fine-feeling jewelry should feel attainable. Every piece is designed in-house, plated in 18K gold, and finished by hand. We create demi-fine treasures meant to be worn, loved, and eventually passed down.

Designed for the Modern Heirloom Velmora was born from a simple belief: fine-feeling jewelry should feel attainable. Every piece is designed in-house, plated in 18K gold, and finished by hand. We create demi-fine treasures meant to be worn, loved, and eventually passed down.
